'''kochagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoanthoid|zoanthoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoanthoid|zoanthoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kochagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochagithi|kochagithi]] || [[word:kochagiji|kochagiji]] || [[word:kochagishi|kochagishi]] || [[word:kochagiki|kochagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochaguthuthu|kochaguthuthu]] || [[word:kochagujuju|kochagujuju]] || [[word:kochagushushu|kochagushushu]] || [[word:kochagukuku|kochagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochaguthu|kochaguthu]] || [[word:kochaguju|kochaguju]] || [[word:kochagushu|kochagushu]] || [[word:kochaguku|kochaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochagufthuf|kochagufthuf]] || [[word:kochagufjuf|kochagufjuf]] || [[word:kochagufshuf|kochagufshuf]] || [[word:kochagufkuf|kochagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochagethe|kochagethe]] || [[word:kochageje|kochageje]] || [[word:kochageshe|kochageshe]] || [[word:kochageke|kochageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochagothotho|kochagothotho]] || [[word:kochagojojo|kochagojojo]] || [[word:kochagoshosho|kochagoshosho]] || [[word:kochagokoko|kochagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochagotho|kochagotho]] || [[word:kochagojo|kochagojo]] || [[word:kochagosho|kochagosho]] || [[word:kochagoko|kochagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochagofthof|kochagofthof]] || [[word:kochagofjof|kochagofjof]] || [[word:kochagofshof|kochagofshof]] || [[word:kochagofkof|kochagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochagïfthïf|kochagïfthïf]] || [[word:kochagïfjïf|kochagïfjïf]] || [[word:kochagïfshïf|kochagïfshïf]] || [[word:kochagïfkïf|kochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochagïfthïfthïf|kochagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kochagïfjïfjïf|kochagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kochagïfshïfshïf|kochagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kochagïfkïfkïf|kochagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochagïfthïf|kochagïfthïf]] || [[word:kochagïfjïf|kochagïfjïf]] || [[word:kochagïfshïf|kochagïfshïf]] || [[word:kochagïfkïf|kochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochagïfthïf|kochagïfthïf]] || [[word:kochagïfjïf|kochagïfjïf]] || [[word:kochagïfshïf|kochagïfshïf]] || [[word:kochagïfkïf|kochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochagæthæ|kochagæthæ]] || [[word:kochagæjæ|kochagæjæ]] || [[word:kochagæshæ|kochagæshæ]] || [[word:kochagækæ|kochagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochagathatha|kochagathatha]] || [[word:kochagajaja|kochagajaja]] || [[word:kochagashasha|kochagashasha]] || [[word:kochagakaka|kochagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochagatha|kochagatha]] || [[word:kochagaja|kochagaja]] || [[word:kochagasha|kochagasha]] || [[word:kochagaka|kochagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochagafthaf|kochagafthaf]] || [[word:kochagafjaf|kochagafjaf]] || [[word:kochagafshaf|kochagafshaf]] || [[word:kochagafkaf|kochagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kochagasha|kochagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kochagshësha|kochagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kochagrosha|kochagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kochagmusha|kochagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kochagyasha|kochagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokochagnkshësha|gokochagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokochagnkrosha|gokochagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokochagnkmusha|gokochagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokochagnkyasha|gokochagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kochachagasha|kochachagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kochachagshësha|kochachagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kochachagrosha|kochachagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kochachagmusha|kochachagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kochachagyasha|kochachagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokochachagnkshësha|gokochachagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokochachagnkrosha|gokochachagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokochachagnkmusha|gokochachagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokochachagnkyasha|gokochachagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kechægasha|kechægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kechægshësha|kechægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kechægrosha|kechægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kechægmusha|kechægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kechægyasha|kechægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokechægnkshësha|gokechægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokechægnkrosha|gokechægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokechægnkmusha|gokechægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokechægnkyasha|gokechægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kochfagasha|kochfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kochfagshësha|kochfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kochfagrosha|kochfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kochfagmusha|kochfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kochfagyasha|kochfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokochfagnkshësha|gokochfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokochfagnkrosha|gokochfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokochfagnkmusha|gokochfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokochfagnkyasha|gokochfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
